title: PacksHQ
description: Hypixel Skyblock's oldest texture pack! Ported into 1.21 (requires Catharsis)
body:
PacksHQ is one of Hypixel Skyblocks oldest custom texture packs! Keeping a very vanilla feel for most items, and making them more recognizable. Includes custom items, armors, ores, pets, guis, and so much more!

Many features are still a work in progress (such as pets) but the pack is actively being worked on and many things will be fixed in future updates.

Still likely full of bugs so if anything is broken join our Discord server and report them!
